description: A simple blog application with posts, users, and comments. Includes a frontend with Next.js App Router, a backend with Next.js API routes, and a PostgreSQL database schema.

pages.description: The main homepage that lists all blog posts.
A page to display a single blog post.

apiRoutes.description: API route to get all posts (GET) and create a new post (POST).
API route for a single post (GET, PUT, DELETE).
